description: Enable real-time event exchange and membership coordination between independently operated servers so users on different servers share rooms without a central authority.

actors.name: Local Server
actors.description: The originating homeserver processing a federation action

actors.name: Remote Server
actors.description: A foreign homeserver participating in a shared room

actors.name: Local User
actors.description: A user whose account is hosted on the local server

fields.name: event_id
fields.label: Globally unique identifier for each event in the distributed graph

fields.name: room_id
fields.label: Identifier for the shared room spanning multiple servers

fields.name: sender
fields.label: Fully-qualified user identifier including home server domain

fields.name: event_type
fields.label: Type of matrix event (e.g. room message, membership change)

fields.name: depth
fields.label: DAG depth of the event for topological ordering

fields.name: prev_event_ids
fields.label: List of parent event IDs this event references in the DAG

fields.name: auth_event_ids
fields.label: State events that cryptographically authorize this event

fields.name: signatures
fields.label: Cryptographic signatures from sending and origin servers

fields.name: partial_state
fields.label: Whether the server has full or partial room state for this event

values.description: Actively fetching historical events from remote servers
All requested events retrieved and persisted

transitions.description: Client requests events near the earliest known room depth
Remote server returns requested historical events
Five consecutive permanent rejections or all candidate servers exhausted

federation_policy: Rooms created with the federation flag disabled reject all membership events from other servers
Only one backfill operation per room may run concurrently
Backfill contacts candidate servers sequentially; after five consecutive 4xx rejections a server is skipped
Every event must carry valid cryptographic signatures from both the sender's and origin server before acceptance
Events received from servers on a federation blocklist are rejected without processing
Servers in backoff state must not be contacted until the backoff window expires
Join operations lock the room event queue until the join completes
Rooms with partial state block certain operations until full state is obtained
Invite events must be co-signed by the invitee's server before distribution

given: room has events older than earliest known depth
at least one candidate remote server is reachable

then.description: Historical events persisted to local event store

backfill_success.result: Missing historical events are available for client retrieval

given: all candidate servers return permanent errors or are unreachable
backfill_rejected.result: Backfill aborted; room history remains incomplete

given: local user requests to join a room hosted on a remote server
room join rules permit the join

then.description: Membership event created and distributed to all room servers

join_via_federation.result: User is a full member of the remote room and receives events

given: local user invites a remote user
inviter has sufficient permission in the room

then.description: Invite event signed by target server and distributed

invite_via_federation.result: Remote user receives invite and can accept to join

any: destination server is on the federation blocklist
destination server is in backoff state

federation_denied.result: Request fails immediately without network contact

given: received event missing valid signature from sender or origin server
event_signature_invalid.result: Event discarded; not persisted or forwarded

errors.message: Federation with this server is not permitted
Unable to retrieve room history from any available server
Event rejected: invalid or missing server signatures
Remote server did not respond to the federation request
This room does not permit federation

events.name: federation.backfill.complete
events.description: Historical events successfully fetched from a remote server

events.name: federation.room.joined
events.description: Local user successfully joined a remote room

events.name: federation.invite.sent
events.description: Invite forwarded to and signed by target server

events.name: federation.event.rejected
events.description: Incoming event rejected due to signature or auth failure

events.name: federation.request.denied
events.description: Outgoing request blocked by blocklist or backoff policy

related.reason: Room creation initialises federation senders for each participating server
Event authorization rules are checked against room power levels
State resolution is applied to events received via federation
Device keys are fetched from remote servers via federation
